etymology.description: Depicts handcuff 㚔 with hands 廾/𠬜 ('release' action) -> semantic borrowing for release (釋) -> archaic form 睪 adds 目 ('eye')
etymology.interpretation: The character 𠬤 visually depicts a handcuff 㚔 with hands 廾/𠬜 positioned in a way that suggests releasing or letting go, which made it suitable for conveying the concept of 'release'. Later, the character evolved to include the component 目 (mù, 'eye'), shown in other forms like 睪 (yì), to relate to actions involving close observation or selection, unified under the broader semantic context of picking or choosing.
